source.fingerprint_input: gateway, buyer and seller full commit IDs separated by newlines

decision_contract.v1_policy: compatibility input only; never emitted by current evaluators
decision_contract.parity: canonical, gateway, Buyer and Seller golden fixtures and consumers passed

mutation_inventory.completeness: independently matched FastAPI OpenAPI; unknown route families fail closed

deterministic.buyer: 39 files, 195 tests, lint checked, typecheck and build passed
deterministic.seller: 27 files, 215 tests, lint checked, typecheck and build passed
deterministic.contract_copy_verifier: passed, including three gateway golden fixtures

local_postgresql.note: Preliminary defect-discovery cycles are excluded from the unchanged-source two-pass claim.

responsive_accessibility.desktop: Buyer 1686x873 and Seller 1920x902: one main, one navigation and one banner; no duplicate IDs, horizontal overflow or captured console errors
responsive_accessibility.mobile: Buyer and Seller 390x844: named navigation dialogs, Escape close, focus return and no horizontal overflow

fqdn_auth0.buyer: re-authenticated at https://ondcbuyer.aadharcha.in/search; Account Ready; checkout Protected by AgentGuard; desktop main/navigation/banner unique with no duplicate IDs or overflow
fqdn_auth0.seller: re-authenticated at https://ondcseller.aadharcha.in/dashboard; Verified identity; protected orders route loaded at /orders

residual_risks: Vercel npm audit reported Buyer 19 and Seller 28 dependency findings during archive builds; remediation requires a separately scoped dependency upgrade and regression campaign.
Tokens removed from the current Buyer tree remain in historical Git objects; rotate or revoke any credential that is still valid. Current-tree secret scans pass.
The Render service branch setting remains historical; exact-commit deployment and the hardened workflow prevent it from selecting release source.
exclusions: native voice or physical microphone proof
